candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line on the income statement.
Balance sheet label is malformed and not a revenue line item for PROF revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit income statement revenue line.
No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present. Gross profit equals revenue in shown years, which is consistent with no separately reported COGS.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A/overhead component.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A-related stock-based compensation; overhead component.
Could be overhead, but preview provides no evidence and label is less specific than admin/marketing.
Could contain overhead, but less specific and may mix non-SG&A items.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement expense row.
Operational statistic, not an expense row.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Used one row outside the candidate list: 'Marketing and distribution expenses'. The candidate list clearly misses this important SG&A component shown in the income statement preview. candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; best match.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Research & Development Expense
candidates.why: Subcomponent of R&D, but rule prefers single reported R&D line rather than summing components.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Excluded subcomponent within R&D; not preferred over the full R&D line.

candidates.row_label: Capitalised expenditure for development and similar work
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset/capitalized development, not period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research and development expenses - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, should not be preferred over explicit reported line.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported R&D expense line only.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; good fallback if specific interest expense is missing.
Most specific interest expense line; preferred.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense line that may be used in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure; lower priority than primary statement lines.
Balancing row; not preferred.
Balance sheet malformed total-assets label, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most specific interest expense rows first, with 'Financial expenses' as fallback.

candidates.why: Income statement equity-method earnings, not book equity.
Income statement item, not equity on balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best match because it excludes non-controlling interests and represents parent equity.
Valid fallback, but less preferred because it may include non-controlling interests.
Total balance sheet, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB; included Total Equity only as fallback.
No minority interest / non-controlling interests line is present. 'Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders' equals 'Total Equity' in the preview, supporting MIB = 0.
